Video.summary: Delight in the artistry of Korean rice cakes from charming character themes to sweet cake creations.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Korean Tteok (Rice Cake)

Video.summary: Sample various types of Korean jeon, from seafood green onion jeon to colorful skewers and mung bean jeon.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Jeon Festival

Video.summary: Delight in Durian Cream Cheese Tart, Strawberry Cream Cheese Tart, Cotton Candy Ice Cream, and Milk Shake.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Tarts and Sweets

Video.summary: Unveil the secrets of crafting Gat Kimchi, Godulbaegi Kimchi, Nurungji, and Lotus Root Chips.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Food Factory

Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Food Factory

Video.summary: Enjoy peanut candy, steamed tteok, honey citron rice snacks, and a refreshing bowl of Korean bingsu.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks
Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Video.summary: Savor different variations of kalguksu, including clam, anchovy broth, and soybean noodles.

Food Kingdom: Kalguksu and Noodle Creations

Video.summary: Indulge in Open Lobster Toast, Raw Tuna Dishes, and various Japanese specialties.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Seafood Cuisine

Video.summary: Savor a variety of Korean sweet treats including macarons and meringue cookies.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Macarons in Korea

Video.summary: Enjoy the blend of Tempura Rice Bowl, Japanese dishes, Soft Tofu Jjambbong, and beloved Chinese classics.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : East Asian Fusion

Video.summary: Explore Korean agriculture with Mushroom, Cherry Tomato, Vegetable, Dairy Cow, and Egg Farms.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Farm

Video.summary: Experience the joy of ice cream like never before with an assortment of uniquely rolled creations.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Ice Cream Roll Special

Video.summary: Indulge in Barley Castella, Giant Chocolate Castella, Chocolate Croissant, and Pony Shape Chocolate.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Castella and Chocolate Dessert

Video.summary: Savor the rich and varied flavors of pork, from succulent pork ribs to melt-in-your-mouth jokbal.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Pork Dishes in Korea

Video.summary: Enjoy a delicious snack combo of tteokbokki, gimbap, and fishcake from Korea’s famous eateries and markets.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Snack Combo

Video.title: FoodieBoy : Amazing Fruit Dessert

Video.title: FoodieBoy : Japanese Dishes in Korea
